name: Warsmith
lore: The Iron Warriors were widely renowned for their siegecraft and combat-engineering skills. The foremost practitioners of these arts were the Warsmiths, whose knowledge of the workings of war engines and automata was second only to the Magi of the Mechanician. Raised to such a rank by Perturaho himself each was a peerless planner and warrior within their Legion. Equally adept at overseeing vast artillery bombardments or crushing their foes with the devastating weaponry they bear, in the latter years of the Horus Heresy, many a holdfast would he brought to ruin as a result of the machinations of a Warsmith of the IVth.

wargearOptions.description: This Model may have a cyber-familiar selected for it for +10 Points.
